summary: Made one surgical entry edit to tie the chapter's opening more directly to chapter 13's closing image of Micah's blood-stiff school polo in the sink. The exit already handed off cleanly into chapter 15's storm-alert morning, so no ending changes were needed.
edits: Revised the opening sentence to name Micah's school polo immediately, strengthening the carryover from chapter 13's final image without changing the scene's action or tone.
